claims.summary: Low-fill semantic traces need longer persistence than high-fill traces to preserve continuity without saturation.
claims.disposition: verify current base, low, high, and recovery windows plus fill-shaped decay tests

claims.summary: Recovery hold and release should not jump at one fill threshold.
claims.disposition: verify the smooth 25-to-40 percent handover, hysteresis, monotonicity, and no-stutter regressions

claims.summary: High-fill surge taper should change continuously rather than snap between 0.90 and 0.72 weighting.
claims.disposition: verify the smoothstep 70-to-80 percent taper and continuity tests

claims.summary: The live decay curve or recovery and surge thresholds should switch to a different interpolation policy.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live sensory cadence and retention behavior
